artPrompt: A weary human cleric campaigner in soot-streaked ashen robes strides door to door down a dim revival street, a guttering candle in one hand and a stack of blank pamphlets in the other, an unnervingly serene smile on a face lit by cold gold halo light. The looming clock tower bleeds against a blood-dark sky behind. Full-figure film-still framing at epic depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Doomsday Canvasser
text:
Lifelink
Whenever Doomsday Canvasser attacks, you may put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. If you do, create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token tapped and attacking. The good word spreads door to door.
flavorText: Quota: fifty doors a day. Conversions: zero. Morale: alarmingly high.
